name: inspector-demo
description: Inspector P0 host demo (feat-20260511-inspector-p0-spike) — ECS-driven 5-component spawn mirror of hello-cube, with engine.startConsole({port: 5732}) explicit opt-in for the @forgeax/engine-console inspector server.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level; inspector-demo bundle is not a baseline anchor

fps.reason: hello-triangle / hello-cube are the established fps anchors; inspector-demo is a host harness for the WebSocket inspector, not a render perf target

bench.reason: inspector-demo is an ECS-driven host harness; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

spike-report.reason: spike artefacts live under .forgeax-harness/forgeax-loop/feat-20260511-inspector-p0-spike/; this app is the host harness consumed by the spike
